libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No additional environment variables or system properties are required. Tests should target APIs present in org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. Avoid the old org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs used by the 1.1.5 tests, because those classes are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 actor jar. If using Pekko's newer typed actor API, that belongs to the separate pekko-actor-typed_2.13 artifact and should not be assumed necessary for coverage of pekko-actor_2.13 itself.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.1.5 test sources include TypedActor/TypedProps coverage that will not compile against 2.0.0-M1; this requires test adaptation, not deterministic setup.

Pekko documentation often shows pekko-testkit or typed actor testkit for application tests, but those are optional testing utilities and are not required to exercise core classic actor behavior in this artifact.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The resolved pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 artifact depends only on scala-library and com.typesafe:config, and meaningful coverage is reachable with the normal Scala scaffold plus direct classic ActorSystem/Props usage; no Docker service, extra Maven dependency, or required environment/system property is evident.
